name: @piko/frontend
description: Piko WDK frontend - core, capabilities, extensions, and playground

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:capabilities && npm run build:extensions && npm run build:playground
scripts.build:capabilities: npm run build:cap-navigation && npm run build:cap-actions && npm run build:cap-partials && npm run build:cap-forms && npm run build:cap-components
scripts.build:extensions: npm run build:modals && npm run build:toasts && npm run build:analytics && npm run build:dev-ext
scripts.test: npm --prefix core run test && npm --prefix capabilities/components run test
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix core install && npm --prefix capabilities/navigation install && npm --prefix capabilities/actions install && npm --prefix capabilities/partials install && npm --prefix capabilities/forms install && npm --prefix capabilities/components install && npm --prefix extensions/modals install && npm --prefix extensions/toasts install && npm --prefix extensions/analytics install && npm --prefix extensions/dev install && npm --prefix playground install

author: PolitePixels Limited
